'''âz-v-z''' ('''zavaza''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:magnoperate|magnoperate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-v-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:magnoperate|magnoperate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-v-z
|-
! Lemma
| zavaza
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zavazithi|zavazithi]] || [[word:zavaziji|zavaziji]] || [[word:zavazishi|zavazishi]] || [[word:zavazi|zavazi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zavazuthuth|zavazuthuth]] || [[word:zavazujuj|zavazujuj]] || [[word:zavazushush|zavazushush]] || [[word:zavaz|zavaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zavazuthu|zavazuthu]] || [[word:zavazuju|zavazuju]] || [[word:zavazushu|zavazushu]] || [[word:zavazu|zavazu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zavazufuth|zavazufuth]] || [[word:zavazufuj|zavazufuj]] || [[word:zavazufush|zavazufush]] || [[word:zavazuf|zavazuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zavazethe|zavazethe]] || [[word:zavazeje|zavazeje]] || [[word:zavazeshe|zavazeshe]] || [[word:zavaze|zavaze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zavazothoth|zavazothoth]] || [[word:zavazojoj|zavazojoj]] || [[word:zavazoshosh|zavazoshosh]] || [[word:zavaz|zavaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zavazotho|zavazotho]] || [[word:zavazojo|zavazojo]] || [[word:zavazosho|zavazosho]] || [[word:zavazo|zavazo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zavazofoth|zavazofoth]] || [[word:zavazofoj|zavazofoj]] || [[word:zavazofosh|zavazofosh]] || [[word:zavazof|zavazof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zavazĂŠthĂŠ|zavazĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zavazĂŠjĂŠ|zavazĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zavazĂŠshĂŠ|zavazĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zavazĂŠ|zavazĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zavazathath|zavazathath]] || [[word:zavazajaj|zavazajaj]] || [[word:zavazashash|zavazashash]] || [[word:zavaz|zavaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zavazatha|zavazatha]] || [[word:zavazaja|zavazaja]] || [[word:zavazasha|zavazasha]] || [[word:zavaza|zavaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zavazafath|zavazafath]] || [[word:zavazafaj|zavazafaj]] || [[word:zavazafash|zavazafash]] || [[word:zavazaf|zavazaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:zavazasha|zavazasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gozavazasha|gozavazasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokizavazasha|gokizavazasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:zavaznĂŒsha|zavaznĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gozavaznknĂŒsha|gozavaznknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokizavaznĂŒsha|gokizavaznĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zavazshĂ«sha|zavazshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozavaznkshĂ«sha|gozavaznkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizavazshĂ«sha|gokizavazshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zavazrosha|zavazrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozavaznkrosha|gozavaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizavazrosha|gokizavazrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zavazmusha|zavazmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gozavaznkmusha|gozavaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizavazmusha|gokizavazmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:zavazsherasha|zavazsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gozavaznksherasha|gozavaznksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokizavazsherasha|gokizavazsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:zavazngasha|zavazngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gozavaznkngasha|gozavaznkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokizavazngasha|gokizavazngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zavazyasha|zavazyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gozavaznkyasha|gozavaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokizavazyasha|gokizavazyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:zavazyamasha|zavazyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gozavaznkyamasha|gozavaznkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokizavazyamasha|gokizavazyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:zavaznĂŒshĂ«sha|zavaznĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozavaznknĂŒshĂ«sha|gozavaznknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizavaznĂŒshĂ«sha|gokizavaznĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zavaznĂŒrosha|zavaznĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozavaznknĂŒrosha|gozavaznknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizavaznĂŒrosha|gokizavaznĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zavaznĂŒmusha|zavaznĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozavaznknĂŒmusha|gozavaznknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizavaznĂŒmusha|gokizavaznĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:zavazshĂ«nĂŒsha|zavazshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozavaznkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gozavaznkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizavazshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokizavazshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zavazshĂ«rosha|zavazshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozavaznkshĂ«rosha|gozavaznkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizavazshĂ«rosha|gokizavazshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zavazshĂ«musha|zavazshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozavaznkshĂ«musha|gozavaznkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizavazshĂ«musha|gokizavazshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:zavazronĂŒsha|zavazronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozavaznkronĂŒsha|gozavaznkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizavazronĂŒsha|gokizavazronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:zavazroshĂ«sha|zavazroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozavaznkroshĂ«sha|gozavaznkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizavazroshĂ«sha|gokizavazroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zavazromusha|zavazromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozavaznkromusha|gozavaznkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizavazromusha|gokizavazromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:zavazmunĂŒsha|zavazmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozavaznkmunĂŒsha|gozavaznkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizavazmunĂŒsha|gokizavazmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:zavazmushĂ«sha|zavazmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozavaznkmushĂ«sha|gozavaznkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizavazmushĂ«sha|gokizavazmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zavazmurosha|zavazmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozavaznkmurosha|gozavaznkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizavazmurosha|gokizavazmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:zavaz|zavaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:zĂŠvĂŠz|zĂŠvĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hozavaz|hozavaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hozĂŠvĂŠz|hozĂŠvĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozavaz|hohozavaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozĂŠvĂŠz|hohozĂŠvĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒzavaz|nĂŒzavaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒzĂŠvĂŠz|nĂŒzĂŠvĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒzavaz|nĂŒnĂŒzavaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒzĂŠvĂŠz|nĂŒnĂŒzĂŠvĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻzavaz|nĂŻzavaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻzĂŠvĂŠz|nĂŻzĂŠvĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻzavaz|nĂŻnĂŻzavaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻzĂŠvĂŠz|nĂŻnĂŻzĂŠvĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luzavaz|luzavaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luzĂŠvĂŠz|luzĂŠvĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzavaz|luluzavaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzĂŠvĂŠz|luluzĂŠvĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lizavaz|lizavaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lizĂŠvĂŠz|lizĂŠvĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizavaz|lilizavaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizĂŠvĂŠz|lilizĂŠvĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kozavaz|kozavaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kozĂŠvĂŠz|kozĂŠvĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozavaz|kokozavaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozĂŠvĂŠz|kokozĂŠvĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kezavaz|kezavaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kezĂŠvĂŠz|kezĂŠvĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezavaz|kekezavaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezĂŠvĂŠz|kekezĂŠvĂŠz]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
